steps.title: Translate to equations and equate
steps.content:
$a$ is $240\%$ of $b$ gives $a = 2.40b$, and $a$ is $70\%$ of $c$ gives $a = 0.70c$. Equating and solving for $c$ in terms of $b$:
$$2.40b = 0.70c$$
$$c = \frac{2.40b}{0.70} = \frac{240}{70}b = \frac{24}{7}b$$

steps.title: Find p such that c equals p percent of b
steps.content:
Since $c = \frac{24}{7}b$ and we need $c = \frac{p}{100}b$:
$$\frac{p}{100} = \frac{24}{7}$$
$$p = \frac{24}{7} \times 100 = \frac{2400}{7} = 342.\overline{857142}$$
The choice closest to $342.\overline{857142}$ is $343$. That confirms D is correct.
